rationale: #807 fixture: 2 of 3 voices walked their full chains and never produced a usable response; only 1 voice succeeded. Pre-T2.x adversarial-review fallback masked this as 'status: clean'. Post-T2.5 the verdict_quality envelope surfaces both dropped voices with blocker_risk=med under implementation sprint — DEGRADED reflects the 1-of-3 minority verdict.
